what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata entry for an image asset named p-34 in the design-source channel, declaring it as source design ground-truth for recent-pitches.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, and zero width/height values
source field is 'design_source_material' and author_session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'
body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-34.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are both 0 despite the file being an image/jpeg entry
No links or relationships are recorded
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed ledger schema
References assets via image:// and blob:// URIs
Uses ISO 8601 timestamps with timezone offset
Separates machine metadata from a human-readable source note
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0, which suggests incomplete extraction or ingestion
No description, alt text, or content summary for the image
Empty links array leaves the asset isolated from related pitches or designs
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source pitch image with a blob pointer but unresolved dimensions and no relationships.
questions: Why are the width and height values 0?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a source design ground-truth record matches the metadata stub, but the zero dimensions indicate the entry may be incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog a pitch image as authoritative design-source material and anchor it with a stable blob reference and creation provenance.
contribution: Provides a canonical channel path and blob URI for a pitch image, plus creation provenance (timestamp and author session), which a fused system can use to resolve or reference the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for a JPEG image asset p-34 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel, tagged as source design ground-truth with a blob reference but zero width and height.
intention_for_embedding: To register a recent pitch image as authoritative design-source material for downstream reference or fusion.
